task_objective: Draft project descriptions for the GitHub repository, update the project license to GPL-3.0-only, set up a new GitHub repository, and link it locally.
design_decisions: Updated the main LICENSE file content from the MIT License to the official GNU General Public License v3.
Updated package.json license field from 'MIT' to 'GPL-3.0-only'.
Updated pyproject.toml license field to 'GPL-3.0-only' and added the GPLv3 license classifier.
Updated the License section in README.md to state 'GPL-3.0-only' instead of 'MIT'.
Created the public GitHub repository 'SDH-Ludusavi' and configured the local 'origin' remote.
Renamed repository from 'SDH-ludusavi' to 'SDH-Ludusavi' to match requested casing and updated local git remote configurations.
Aligned URL references in package.json and pyproject.toml to match 'SDH-Ludusavi' casing.
Modified scripts/package_plugin.py to append '--forceExit' to the 'pnpm run build' command, preventing Rollup from hanging after compilation in build scripts.
